title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Finance in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Finance:
Bajaj Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
